candidates.why: Best total top-line revenue/sales line; suitable as primary revenue measure across years.
Direct sales/revenue line and preferable when available; may be missing in some earlier years.
Balancing row, not a true revenue label; should not be used unless nothing else exists.

variables.notes: Use revenue labels as a priority list. 'Net sales' is the most direct sales line when present; 'Total Revenue' covers years where sales is embedded with other operating income.

candidates.why: This appears to be the direct operating input cost / cost of sales line.

variables.notes: Selected the only clear direct production/service cost line.

candidates.why: Operating overhead component; appears populated in recent years.
Another personnel overhead line, likely same concept for different periods/reporting style.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component and allowable overhead item.
Catch-all overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Would be SG&A-like overhead if populated.
Would be SG&A-like personnel overhead if used.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No single explicit populated SG&A total row exists aside from a balancing value, which must be excluded. Selected overhead component rows only; excluded COGS, D&A, interest, taxes, and totals/balancing items.
No dedicated research/development line is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; useful fallback if dedicated interest expense missing in some years.
Another finance-cost label, likely alternative reporting taxonomy in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities for leased equipment
candidates.why: Interest expense but only lease-specific, so narrower than general interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense but lease-specific and not comprehensive.
Best direct match for general interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; lower priority than reported statement lines.

variables.notes: Priority list favors the dedicated general interest line first, then broader finance-cost labels as fallbacks. Excluded lease-only rows from final priority to avoid overly narrow coverage when a general line exists.

candidates.why: Not book equity; irrelevant for BE.
Equity component only, not total owner equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match because BE should exclude non-controlling interests.
Contains NCI and would risk double counting if MIB also used.
Balancing row, not a true equity measure.
Balancing row, not a true equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not a true equity measure.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Selected parent-owner equity to exclude non-controlling interests, per rule.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Best match for minority/non-controlling interests on the balance sheet.
Alternative balance sheet label for the same concept.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list uses balance-sheet NCI labels only, avoiding income-statement attribution lines.
